step_1_image_prompt: An overhead three-quarter angle shot of a daybed scene captured in a candid amateur smartphone snapshot with natural fabric texture and visible weave detail. A rumpled cream waffle-knit blanket spreads across the frame with soft folds and gentle creases, a leopard-print throw pillow at the upper edge of the composition near the head of the bed. An open hardcover book lies face-down on the blanket at the left side, pages slightly splayed, linen-bound spine showing wear. A small matte ceramic mug of herbal tea sits at the upper-right with a pale gold liquid and a thin curl of steam rising. A small dried lavender bundle tied with twine rests along the lower edge of the frame, sage-purple stems against the cream waffle. The center of the composition is intentionally empty — clean rumpled blanket surface with generous negative space, perfectly framed by the surrounding items. Soft warm afternoon daylight from the right side of the frame, gentle side-light wash, warm bone tones across the cream waffle blanket, soft diffuse shadows cast leftward from each object. Shot on iPhone 15 Pro low-angle close to the blanket surface, slight tilt up. Real photograph, not AI-generated, no model pose, candid moment. Lazy weekend afternoon recovery slow reading mood, palette of cream waffle, leopard tan, warm amber tea, sage lavender. Minimalist editorial composition with deliberate emptiness at center.

fal_pulid_params.negative_prompt: extra limbs, deformed hands, mutated hands, bad anatomy, lowres, blurry, watermark, text, signature, distorted, plastic surfaces, oversaturated, AI-generated look, illustration, 3D render, CGI, person in frame, hands in frame, face in frame

step_2_brief.intended_grip_or_placement: The Alluvi box sits on the rumpled blanket at the center of the composition, front face angled three-quarters toward the camera, the open book to its left, the herbal tea mug to its upper-right, the lavender bundle along the lower edge.
step_2_brief.intended_product_position: Step 2 will composite the Alluvi box at the center of the rumpled cream waffle blanket, resting naturally on the soft fabric with subtle blanket folds slightly pressing against the lower edge of the box, front face angled three-quarters toward the camera to catch the warm afternoon side-light from the right.

id_weight_recommendation.reasoning: No persona in frame — id_weight lowered from 1.0 to 0.5 to prevent PuLID from forcing any partial face or hand artifact into the empty center of the blanket where the product will be composited in Step 2.
